title: Scripts for ChIP-seq analysis and design of an oligopaint library
author: Lennart Hilbert
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Scripts used for ChIP-seq analysis of RNA polymerase II Ser5P and Histone 3 K27ac in zebrafish embryos, as well as the design of an oligopaint library for DNA fluorescence in-situ hybridization of selected genomic regions.
steps_raw: Scripts used for ChIP-seq analysis of RNA polymerase II Ser5P and Histone 3 K27ac in zebrafish embryos, as well as the design of an oligopaint library for DNA fluorescence in-situ hybridization of selected genomic regions.
